2026-05-08.title: UniVA: Unified Value Alignment for Generative Recommendation in Industrial Advertising
2026-05-08.authors: Xinxun Zhang, Yuling Xiong, Jiale Zhou, Zhengkai Guo, Zhennan Pang, Junbang Huo, et al. (16 authors)
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 三层价值对齐 (Commercial SID + Generation-as-Ranking + Value Beam) 是新组合；离线 +37% Hit@100 / 在线 +1.5% GMV 工业级数字；电商广告核心场景。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Three-layer value alignment (Commercial SID + Generation-as-Ranking + Value Beam) is a novel composition; offline +37% Hit@100, online +1.5% GMV are industrial-grade numbers; advertising is the core e-com use case.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: 三组件流水线：Commercial SID Tokenizer 把价值属性注入 SID；Generation-as-Ranking Decoder 由 SFT + eCPM-aware RL 联合训练，单次解码完成生成与排序；Value-guided 个性化 beam search 配 trie 约束在线解码到合法 SID 路径。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Three-component pipeline: Commercial SID Tokenizer injects value attributes into SID code-books; Generation-as-Ranking Decoder is jointly optimized by SFT and eCPM-aware RL so generation and ranking happen in a single decoding pass; value-guided personalized beam search with a trie constrains online decoding to valid SID paths.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把价值对齐从 reward shaping 提升到 token 表征层；GAR decoder 抹平离线-在线 gap；trie + value beam search 是工业落地关键。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Lifts value alignment from reward shaping to the token-representation layer; GAR decoder collapses the offline-online gap; trie + value beam search is the deployment-critical piece.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: Tencent WeChat Channels 离线 Hit Rate@100 +37.04%；在线 A/B GMV +1.5%。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Tencent WeChat Channels offline Hit Rate@100 +37.04%; online A/B GMV +1.5%.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 在线 A/B 测试是真实工业平台 (WeChat Channels) 上的部署性验证，对生成式推荐的实用性是有力证据。

2026-05-08.title: CMTA: Leveraging Cross-Modal Temporal Artifacts for Generalizable AI-Generated Video Detection
2026-05-08.authors: Hang Wang, Chao Shen, Chenhao Lin, Minghui Yang, Lei Zhang, Cong Wang
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 跨模态时序稳态作为 AIGV 指纹是论文级新观察；4 个数据集 / 40 子集 SOTA；与达人内容审核直接相关。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Cross-modal temporal stability as an AIGV fingerprint is a paper-grade new observation; SOTA across 4 datasets / 40 subsets; directly relevant to influencer content moderation.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: BLIP 给每帧打 caption，CLIP 编码到共享空间得到帧级 (视觉, 文本) 特征对；GRU 分支建模跨模态对齐相似度的粗粒度时间稳定度，Transformer 分支捕获细粒度帧间变化，融合后做二分类。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Per-frame captions from BLIP are encoded with CLIP into a shared space, yielding (visual, text) feature pairs. A GRU branch models the coarse temporal stability of cross-modal alignment; a Transformer branch captures fine-grained inter-frame variation; the fused representation feeds a binary classifier.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把 prompt 约束下生成视频的'语义稳态'识别为新指纹，与现有空间/时空伪影路线正交。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Identifies the prompt-induced 'semantic stability' of generated video as a novel fingerprint, orthogonal to existing spatial / spatio-temporal artifact lines.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: GenVideo / EvalCrafter / VideoPhy / VidProM 4 大数据集、40 个子集上设新 SOTA，跨生成器泛化优势显著。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Sets new SOTA across 40 subsets of GenVideo / EvalCrafter / VideoPhy / VidProM with strong cross-generator generalization.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 覆盖 40 个子集的跨生成器泛化测试是 AIGV 检测里最难的指标；CMTA 在所有子集上 SOTA。

2026-05-08.title: TabEmbed: Benchmarking and Learning Generalist Embeddings for Tabular Understanding
2026-05-08.authors: Minjie Qiang, Mingming Zhang, Xiaoyi Bao, Xing Fu, Yu Cheng, Weiqiang Wang, Zhongqing Wang, Ningtao Wang
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 首个表格通用嵌入模型 + 配套基准；对电商商品库与用户特征极有用。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: First generalist tabular embedding + accompanying benchmark; very useful for e-com catalogs and user features.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: 把分类与检索统一为语义匹配，用大规模对比学习 + positive-aware 难负样本挖掘训练；同步推出 TabBench 评估表格嵌入模型。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Unifies tabular classification and retrieval as semantic matching, trained with large-scale contrastive learning and positive-aware hard negative mining; introduces TabBench for tabular embedding evaluation.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把 NLP foundation embedding 思路迁移到表格；TabBench 自身具社区价值。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Transfers the NLP foundation-embedding paradigm to tabular data; TabBench has standalone community value.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: 在 TabBench 显著优于现有文本嵌入模型 (摘要未给具体百分点)。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Significantly outperforms existing text embedding models on TabBench (numbers not in abstract).
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: TabBench 是首个面向 tabular embedding 的综合基准，覆盖分类与检索双任务。

2026-05-08.title: Multimodal Data Curation Through Ranked Retrieval
2026-05-08.authors: Pratyush Muthukumar, Harshil Kotamreddy, Sarah Amiraslani, Tomo Kanazawa, Ramani Akkati, Shaan Jain, Andrew Mathau
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: SNS + 偏置感知 EEE 是新颖二阶设计；电商大规模数据清洗痛点直接命中。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: SNS + bias-aware EEE is a novel two-tier design; squarely targets large-scale e-com data cleaning pain points.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: Symmetric Nucleus Subsampling 在训练对级修剪互相支撑的子片段；Expert Embedding Engine 用学得投影融合多 embedding expert 并加 bias-aware 损失。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Symmetric Nucleus Subsampling trims training pairs to mutually-supportive sub-spans; Expert Embedding Engine fuses complementary embedding experts via a learned projection with a bias-aware objective.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 同时干预'训练对'和'嵌入模型'两层；可作为预训练数据 curator 插件。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Intervenes on both training pairs and the embedding model; usable as a pretraining data-curator plugin.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: Modality gap 平均压缩 >90%；数据 blend 在下游模型上优于 stratified sampling。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Modality gap collapses by >90% on average; data blends outperform stratified sampling and traditional curation baselines.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 把 modality gap 量化收窄 >90% 是直观且可验证的强证据。

2026-05-08.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction
2026-05-08.authors: Zhuofeng Li, Haoxiang Zhang, Cong Wei, Pan Lu, Ping Nie, Yi Lu, Yuyang Bai, Shangbin Feng, et al.
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 在接口层质疑 retriever 是否需要存在；BRIGHT/BEIR 多子集超过 sparse/dense/rerank。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Questions the very existence of a retriever at the interface layer; outperforms sparse/dense/rerank baselines on BRIGHT/BEIR subsets.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: 让 agent 用 grep / 文件读 / shell 等通用工具直接访问原始语料，**完全不走 embedding/向量索引**；无需离线索引，自然适配演化语料。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Lets the agent search the raw corpus directly with general-purpose terminal tools (grep, file reads, shell scripts), with no embedding model or vector index; needs no offline indexing and adapts to evolving corpora.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把检索瓶颈定位到'接口分辨率'而非推理能力，与 ReAct/Toolformer 路线正交。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Identifies retrieval bottleneck as 'interface resolution' rather than reasoning capacity; orthogonal to ReAct / Toolformer.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: BRIGHT / BEIR 多子集明显超过 sparse/dense/rerank；BrowseComp-Plus 与 multi-hop QA 高准确率。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Substantially outperforms sparse/dense/rerank baselines on BRIGHT/BEIR subsets; high accuracy on BrowseComp-Plus and multi-hop QA.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 在 BrowseComp-Plus 这种 agent search benchmark 上，无 retriever 的方案取得最强结果，反差极强。

2026-05-08.title: Effective Knowledge Transfer for Multi-Task Recommendation Models
2026-05-08.authors: Guohao Cai, Jun Yuan, Zhenhua Dong
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: Router/Transmitter/Enhanced 是 PLE/MMoE 思路的增量；商业 A/B eCPM +3.93%。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Router/Transmitter/Enhanced is an incremental extension of PLE/MMoE; commercial A/B shows +3.93% eCPM.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: Router 跨任务聚合分发知识，每个 CVR 任务挂 transmitter 转换 router 输出，enhanced 模块抑制负迁移。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: A router aggregates and disseminates knowledge across tasks; each CVR task has a transmitter that transforms router outputs; an enhanced module mitigates negative transfer.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把 negative transfer 显式作为设计目标；模块分工清晰。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Treats negative transfer as an explicit design target; clean module separation.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 工业 A/B 验证 eCPM 提升，落地价值可信。

2026-05-08.title: Robust Multimodal Recommendation via Graph Retrieval-Enhanced Modality Completion
2026-05-08.authors: Yuan Li, Jun Hu, Jiaxin Jiang, Bryan Hooi, Bingsheng He
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: subgraph retrieval + 模态补全的耦合是新组合；多模态推荐 = 电商主战场。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Combination of subgraph retrieval + modality completion is novel; multimodal recommendation is the e-com main battlefield.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: modality-aware subgraph retrieval 在物品图找语义相近邻居作补全证据；Graph Transformer 全局注意力联合编码；learnable sparse-routing codebook 做正则。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: A modality-aware subgraph retrieval finds semantically similar neighbors on the item graph as completion evidence; a Graph Transformer jointly encodes with global attention; a learnable sparse-routing codebook acts as a regularizer.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 把模态缺失视为图补全问题，sparse-routing codebook 类 VQ 思路稳定训练。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Frames missing modalities as graph completion; sparse-routing codebook (VQ-like) stabilizes training.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: 摘要未公布具体数据集与指标。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Specific datasets / numbers not provided in abstract.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 针对'传感器故障/隐私约束'造成的模态缺失场景给出系统化方案。

2026-05-08.title: MiA-Signature: Approximating Global Activation for Long-Context Understanding
2026-05-08.authors: Yuqing Li, Jiangnan Li, Mo Yu, Zheng Lin, Weiping Wang, Jie Zhou
2026-05-08.affiliation: Not specified in abstract (Tencent listed in HF Daily aggregator)
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 把 global ignition 形式化为 submodular cover 是新颖灵感；与 RAG/agent 耦合具体可落。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Formalizing global ignition as submodular cover is a novel inspiration; concrete coupling with RAG/agents.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: 用子模选择挑出能覆盖 query 激活上下文的高层概念集 (MiA-Signature)，工作记忆轻量迭代精化，作为 RAG / agent 的条件信号。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Submodular selection picks a set of high-level concepts that cover the query-induced activation space (the MiA-Signature), refined by lightweight working-memory iterations; the signature acts as a conditioning signal for RAG / agents.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 认知科学 'global workspace' 的可计算化；与 RAG / agent 双场景。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: A computable counterpart to cognitive science's global workspace; targets both RAG and agentic systems.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: 多个 long-context understanding 任务一致提升 (摘要未给具体数字)。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Consistent gains on multiple long-context understanding tasks (no concrete numbers in abstract).
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: Submodular selection 是经典组合优化工具，被复用在 LLM 长文本压缩，连接清晰。

2026-05-08.title: Negative Data Mining for Contrastive Learning in Dense Retrieval at IKEA.com
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 工程组合，但工业 A/B 实测 + 行为分析 + 诚实失利归因价值高。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Engineering composition, but industrial A/B + behavioral analysis + honest negative-result attribution are valuable.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: 在 IKEA 双塔 late-interaction 检索上比较负采样：(1) 利用商品分类树+属性的 structured negatives；(2) LLM-as-Judge 给所有候选打相关分。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Compares negative sampling for IKEA late-interaction dense retrieval: (1) structured negatives leveraging product taxonomy and attributes; (2) LLM-as-Judge that scores all candidates per query.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 诚实呈现 A/B 失利，归因到 67% 热门 query 零点击率。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Honestly reports the A/B failure and attributes it to 67% of head queries having >50% zero-click rates.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: 离线类目准确率 +2.6%；在线 A/B 用户参与无显著差异 (p>0.05)。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Offline category accuracy +2.6%; online A/B shows no statistically significant engagement gain (p>0.05).
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 把 retrieval offline 与 online 的 gap 用 query 分布解释，是工业研究里少见的诚实归因。

2026-05-08.title: Beyond Seeing Is Believing: On Crowdsourced Detection of Audiovisual Deepfakes
2026-05-08.authors: Michael Soprano, Andrea Cioci, Stefano Mizzaro
2026-05-08.rationale_zh: 标准 user study；价值在为治理流水线提供实证基线。
2026-05-08.rationale_en: Standard user study; value lies in providing an empirical baseline for governance pipelines.
2026-05-08.method_overview_zh: Prolific 平台两组对照实验，96 视频×10 judgments=960 条人工判断，量化人对真伪、伪造类型、时间戳定位的准确率与一致性。
2026-05-08.method_overview_en: Two matched Prolific crowdsourcing studies, 96 videos × 10 judgments = 960 ratings, measuring authenticity detection, manipulation-type identification, and temporal localization.
2026-05-08.innovation_zh: 提示自动化系统应聚焦 modality 与时间戳定位。
2026-05-08.innovation_en: Suggests automated systems should focus on modality attribution and temporal localization.
2026-05-08.key_metric_zh: Authenticity 二分类聚合稳定；modality attribution 噪声高；audio+video 联合伪造识别尤难。
2026-05-08.key_metric_en: Authenticity detection stabilizes after aggregation; modality attribution is noisy; joint audio-video manipulations are hardest to identify.
2026-05-08.experiment_highlight_zh: 实验设计扎实 (10 judgments/video)，结论对内容审核团队工作流配置有直接借鉴。
